_note: SAMPLE AGENT demo-grade utterance bank (Bubble 9). Scope is intentionally narrow: triage + escalation only — greet, capture basic info (name, callback, address, intent), recover after a consent denial, confirm a callback, escalate to a human. NO qualification logic, NO appointment booking, NO calendar integration. Anything complex routes to 'let me have someone call you back.' Production NLU/dialogue lives in echo-os.

greeting: Hi, thanks for calling Apex Roofing — this call may be recorded for quality. I see you got our note about possible storm damage on your roof. What's going on?
Thanks for calling Apex Roofing about your roof — this call may be recorded for quality. How can I help?
capturing: Got it. Can I start with your name and the best callback number?
Thanks. And what's the property address with the damage?
Perfect. Is this storm or wind damage, a leak, or something else?
recovery_after_deny: Absolutely — I've stopped the recording. We don't need it. Let's keep going.
Of course, recording is off now. No problem at all — where were we?
callback_confirmation: No problem. What's the best time for a specialist to call you back?
Got it. When's a good window for our team to reach you?
close: Great — I'll have someone from Apex Roofing call you back at the time you gave. Anything else I should let them know?
Perfect. A specialist from Apex Roofing will follow up at that time. Anything else for them before I let you go?
